name: Quick-Fix Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 Roll refrigerator chocolate chip cookie dough
recipeInstructions:
Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Cut the roll into 24 slices.
3. Form each slice into a stick by rolling between your palms.
4. Place each on a cookie sheet and flatten slightly.
5. Bake as usual. Cool on a flat surface.
Sugar Cookie Dough:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Pat the roll of sugar cookie dough into a rectangle about 1/4-inch thick.
3. Sprinkle the dough with orange rind.
4. Press the rind into the surface.
5. Freeze the dough for 10 minutes.
6. Cut leaf shapes from the frozen dough using cookie cutters.
7. Place the dough shapes on a cookie sheet.
8. Brush each shape lightly with egg white.
9. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar mixture.
10. Bake as usual. Cool on a flat surface.
Note: THE DESSERT SHOW #DS3058
